emotional_tone: Authoritative, clear, precise, and highly functional. A 'Control Room' feel.
design_philosophy: Information density without clutter. Use 1px hard borders, no soft shadows, and high-contrast typography to create a brutalist yet polished SaaS interface. Color is used strictly for function (status, alerts) and never for decoration.

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: MODE B: 'Control Room' Grid - gap-4 or gap-6. Every pixel must be utilized with tight widget integration. Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 for analytics.
layout_and_spacing.sidebar: w-64 border-r border-zinc-200 bg-white flex flex-col h-screen fixed left-0 top-0

components.button: rounded-none border border-zinc-950 shadow-none hover:bg-zinc-900 hover:text-white transition-colors uppercase tracking-widest text-xs font-bold
components.input: rounded-none border-zinc-200 shadow-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-zinc-950 focus-visible:border-zinc-950
components.badge: rounded-none text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider px-2 py-1
components.table: text-sm, subtle bottom borders on rows, no vertical borders, minimalist header with uppercase tiny text

motion_and_interaction.hover: Harsh, immediate color flips (e.g., white background to black background) rather than soft fades.

empty_state_graphic.description: Bold geometric pattern in black and white

testing.data_testid_guidelines: Every interactive and key informational element MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (kebab-case, role-based). Examples: `login-form-submit-button`, `sidebar-nav-payroll`, `clock-in-button`.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Shadcn/UI heavily but strip all rounded corners (`rounded-none`) and shadows (`shadow-none`) to fit the Swiss Brutalist archetype. Ensure contrast is extremely high. All UI elements should be structurally separated by 1px solid borders. Install fonts from Google Fonts: Chivo (headings) and Manrope (body).
